title: First Apple-Notes Ingest Batch — 2026-04-26
html:
First Ingest Pass — Apple Notes (10 of 466)

This is the meta-summary of the first INGEST sweep across raw/apple-notes/. The corpus is 466 markdown files spanning July 2018 → April 2026 (8 years). This pass touched 10 of them, biased toward narrative-rich, multi-thread notes that would seed connection density rather than orphan stubs.

The 10 ingested

# Filename Era Why picked
1 2019-08-12-keep-things-simple.md early Earliest specimen of founder-Yahir voice — pitch questions + legacy questions in parallel columns
2 2019-09-10-i-am-low-key-writing-this-to-end-more-like-slightly-silence.md early Cleanest example of note as letter to self form; first cross-state romantic processing
3 2020-03-30-facebook.md early Age-17 covid-era brain dump — value-investing watchlist + post-pandemic futures + life admin
4 2021-04-19-an-18-year-old-walks-up-to-a-circus-potentially-seeking-a-jo.md middle A polished dad wisdom parable — short, recurrable
5 2022-03-11-made-people-vote-to-prove-voting-is-a-farce-only-effective-t.md middle First substantial reading log in the corpus — One Hundred Years of Solitude chapter-by-chapter
6 2022-10-25-ahmad-jamal.md middle Densest single note ingested — bridge between college Yahir and founder Yahir
7 2024-12-14-this-is-the-end-i-have-have-departed-from-china-and-am-on-my.md middle/recent End-of-chapter reflection on the China stretch
8 2025-03-01-whoa-lets-think-about-what-just-happening-dude-you-go-to-pea.md recent Sensitive — handled with the personal-stub conservatism rule
9 2025-09-23-how-im-scraping-by.md recent Ground truth for Memory.md "no runway buffer" claim
10 2026-01-13-rankettcom.md recent Clearest live statement of rankett's GTM (whitelabel through agencies)

Stubs created

  • Entities (36): people (14), places (6), companies/orgs (13), products/tools/books (4)
  • Concepts (29)
  • Total: 65 stubs

All are tagged #stub per the schema. Many are intentionally sparse — densify-on-sight rather than write speculative content. Personal stubs (Jo, Valeria, Yesenia, Emilio, Alexandria) are deliberately one-line — wait for explicit relationship signal before fleshing out.

Themes that emerged across the 10

1. Stacked-column note structure. Yahir's notes are almost never monothematic. From age 17 (2020-03-30-facebook) through age 23 (2022-10-25-ahmad-jamal), the same form repeats: a column of business/idea fragments next to a column of stocks/products next to a column of personal admin next to a column of texts to send. Treat any single Apple Note as a junk-drawer, not a memo. Entity extraction should expect 5–20 tags per note, not 1–2.

2. The legacy question template, recurrent. First seen in 2019 ("What do you see in the wake of death / What legacy do you want to leave behind"). Restated in 2024 ("If I were to die today, my life will have been amazing"). This is a stable Yahir-template, not a one-off.

3. Founder philosophy that hardens over time. A traceable evolution:

  • 2019: fear of not doing > disruption > elevator pitch
  • 2022: voluntary adversity > nonobvious > asking the right question
  • 2025: bridge income strategies > no runway discipline
  • 2026: ai search optimization > whitelabel strategy > share of voice
    Each era's mantra becomes the next era's lived constraint.

4. ChatGPT-era foresight, real and early. 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream is dated weeks after ChatGPT's public launch — and Yahir is already brainstorming chatgpt product wedges. That same note holds the line "Asking the right question will be the next best skill to have" — a thesis that becomes rankett three years later. The arc from that note → 2026 01 13 rankett com is the spine of the corpus.

5. Place as chapter divider. Yahir's life chunks by city: grants pass or (origin) → osu / Corvallis (college) → china (2024 immersion) → austin tx (Sep 2025–present). Each transition gets a marker note. There's a notable 9-month gap between Dec 2024 (leaves China) and Sep 2025 (arrives Austin) that's worth mapping in a future batch.

6. Recurring people. Family/inner-circle names that appear in 3+ notes already: emilio (letters / trips), valeria (graduations / visits), yesenia (editing / family logistics), jo (2022 dating thread). Dad shows up as a wisdom-source (dad wisdom) without being named. Mom appears as a financial backstop in 2025. None have surnames yet.

7. Reading and listening clusters. First confirmed:

  • Books: one hundred years of solitude (deep read 2022), Borges, Stendhal, Bolaño, Paul Goodman, Lee Kuan Yew, Paul Graham
  • Jazz pillars: ahmad jamal, bill evans, louis armstrong, miles davis, john coltrane
  • Founders: palmer luckey, Masayoshi Son, Andrew Grove, Jensen (likely Huang)
    These are nascent — most are single-mention. Worth tracking.

8. Crypto/DAO/Web3 as a closed chapter (probably). The 2022 corvallis crypto club / coinbase / dao mergers / $PHIB activity has zero echo in 2025–2026 notes. Yahir's attention moved fully to AI between 2023 and 2025.

9. Vulnerability lives in three places. (a) Late-night letter to self entries (2019, 2024), (b) the 2025 Peacock incident, (c) the 2025 "scraping by" inventory. Tone elsewhere is build-mode bravado. The vault should preserve both registers without flattening either.

Suggested next batch (themes worth deepening)

In rough priority:

  1. The 2024 China stretch — 2024-09-25-things-to-do-in-chengdu, 2024-10-22-coffee-shops-in-shanghai, 2024-10-22-valeria-visit, 2024-10-30-thoughts-on-my-future, 2024-11-28-leading-thoughts-about-6-month-adventure, 2024-12-14-this-is-the-end (already done). That entire arc deserves a cluster.
  2. The Rankett deep-dive note — 2026-01-07-rankett-meetup-prep-guide.md is 25KB (largest in corpus). Likely a comprehensive product/positioning artifact. High ROI for the Rankett page.
  3. The big todo dumps — 2025-05-30-todos.md (13KB), 2024-12-21-todos.md (5KB), 2024-05-13-things.md (6KB). Likely yield massive entity/project graphs in a single read.
  4. Fill the 2018-2020 narrative gap — most early entries are very short. But 2018-12-24-normal-neutral-to-everything, 2019-11-13-coding-zeal, 2020-04-23-go-to-diamond (2.5KB) are substantial and would round out early-Yahir.
  5. "Call with X" cluster — many call-with-*.md and call-recording.md files in 2025–2026. These are probably calendar artifacts; might be worth ingesting in a single pass to extract people-stubs efficiently.
  6. Eli/family advice stack — 2025-02-01-eli-life-advice.md, the gifts-for-people lists, the 2025-04-20 "people I am indebted to for helping me" — these look like Yahir consciously building a relationship map. Densify-friendly.
  7. The "Sam !!!!!!" thread — beyond the 2025-03-01 incident, there's 2025-09-25-the-manner-that-emily-trails-her-words-is-eerily-similar-to. Also files mentioning Owen, Bubbas, Bapi, Charlie, Stepheven. A "people in Yahir's social orbit 2025-2026" pass could be productive.

Quality-bar checks

  • Every summary contains ≥5 wikilinks (lowest: 5 in 2021-04-19-circus-parable; highest: 28 in 2022-10-25-ahmad-jamal-stream).
  • Every stub has frontmatter with type, created, updated, tags. All tagged #stub.
  • Personal sensitivity: no stub for the 2025-03 ex-partner; conservative one-liners for likely-family names; the Peacock summary deliberately does not name the other parties involved.
  • 0 raw files modified.

Files touched

  • wiki/summaries/ — 10 new summaries + this meta
  • wiki/entities/ — 36 new stubs
  • wiki/concepts/ — 29 new stubs
  • wiki/index.md — fully rewritten with new entities/concepts/summaries (preserved Meta section)
  • wiki/log.md — appended pipe-format entries for the 10 ingests
  • wiki/projects/rankett.md — not yet updated, but 2026 01 13 rankett com gives strong signal to flesh it out (category = AI search optimization, GTM = whitelabel via agencies). Recommended for next pass.

related.label: Ahmad Jamal stream — late-2022 polymath dump (jazz, crypto, ChatGPT, CS 162)
